name: Budabon

forms.name: Johtonian
forms.pokedexDescription: Budabon is a very resilient Pokémon, seemingly being found across the world in a variety of forms. Because of how common Budabon is, it was the first documented Pokémon in the original Pokédex, making it Pokémon Number 0. This specific form of Budabon is known for its delayed reactions and relaxed temperament.

forms.name: Jetian
forms.pokedexDescription: Budabon is a very resilient Pokémon, seemingly being found across the world in a variety of forms. Because of how common Budabon is, it was the first documented Pokémon in the original Pokédex, making it Pokémon Number 0. This specific form of Budabon is known for its tear-inducing skin and mischevious temperament. Some scientists argue that Jetian Budabon isn't a true Budabon because it doesn't resemble a fruit, but these scientists fail to realize how awesome Jetian Budabon is.
